title: hedyotis articularis subsp. santapaui
intro: Hedyotis articularis subsp. santapaui, also known as Santapaui's Hedyotis, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in the Western Ghats of India. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hedyotis articularis subsp. santapaui include its use in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves are also used in the preparation of herbal teas and powders.
